scenarios.name: Fake Knight Incident
scenarios.description: A mysterious knight arrives in the village of Greyford, claiming to be on a mission from the capital. However, the local blacksmith suspects the knight is a fraud, creating tension and conflict within the community.

timeline.title: Knight Arrives
timeline.description: A knight claiming royal authority arrives at Greyford, seeking an audience with the village elder.
informationReleased: Knight claims to be from the capital
timeline.memoryChange: Thomas gains memory of knight's arrival

timeline.title: Evidence Discovered
timeline.description: Duran inspects the knight's armor and discovers inconsistencies in the heraldic markings.
timeline.memoryChange: Duran gains memory of armor inspection

timeline.title: Truth Revealed
timeline.description: The player discovers the knight's true identity. The knight is actually a deserter fleeing justice.
timeline.memoryChange: All NPCs update beliefs about the knight

timeline.title: Conflict Escalates
timeline.description: Thomas and Duran argue publicly about the knight's legitimacy.

timeline.title: Resolution Attempt
timeline.description: Mila attempts to mediate between Thomas and Duran.

timeline.title: Final Confrontation
timeline.description: The knight's deception is fully exposed. The village must decide what to do.

timeline.title: New Order
timeline.description: The village establishes new security protocols based on the lessons learned.

scenarios.name: The Missing Heirloom
scenarios.description: A valuable family heirloom goes missing from the local lord's estate. Suspicions run high as the community turns against each other.

timeline.title: Discovery of Theft
timeline.description: The heirloom is discovered missing from its display case.

timeline.title: Investigation Begins
timeline.description: The player begins investigating the theft, interviewing staff members.
